Secure database ports: bind to localhost, add Redis password

Redis was compromised via SLAVEOF attack (external IP 175.24.232.83
made it a read-only replica). Root cause: port 6379 open to internet
without authentication.

Fix:
- Bind PostgreSQL, Redis, ClickHouse, API ports to 127.0.0.1
- Add --requirepass to Redis with REDIS_PASSWORD env var
- Update REDIS_URL to include password
- Update healthcheck to authenticate

commit.message:
fix: improve low-freq detection and eliminate duplicate advisories (#69)

Reduce Schroeder room-mode penalty from -0.25 to -0.12 — the old value
consumed 76% of the starting feedback probability, making low-frequency
detection nearly impossible. Sync classifier prominence floor with the
detector's prominenceDb setting instead of a hardcoded 10 dB base.

Handle advisoryCleared in React state so cleared-then-re-detected peaks
don't accumulate duplicate advisory cards.

Fix audio output: auto-detect PipeWire/default device

pyo was defaulting to ALSA device 0 (HDMI monitor) instead of the
system audio manager. Added _find_output_device() that prefers
'default' (PipeWire/PulseAudio passthrough), then 'pipewire',
then falls back to the first available output.

Fix Jupiter swap failure: higher slippage, partial-success recovery, light theme status modal

- jupiter.ts: increase slippageBps 50 → 300 (0.5% → 3%) — synthetic tokens like TSLAx need more headroom
- swap.ts: add 'bridge_jupiter_failed' SwapStatus + usdcInWallet field so we can track USDC safely recovered in wallet
- useSwapOrchestrator.ts: wrap Jupiter swap in its own try-catch separate from the bridge try-catch; on Jupiter failure set bridge_jupiter_failed status with USDC amount and jup.ag recovery link; fix filledAmount parsing (strip decimal with split('.')[0]) to avoid float precision issues
- SwapStatusModal.tsx: handle bridge_jupiter_failed — shows amber recovery card with USDC balance, jup.ag swap link, and technical details collapsible; convert from dark to light theme (text-white/xx → #8b88a0/#4a4568)
- StepIndicator.tsx: add 'error' step state (red ✗) for step 2 on bridge_jupiter_failed; convert to light theme (purple active, #e8e4f2 borders)
- BridgeStatusCard.tsx: add bridge_jupiter_failed to isDone set; full light theme conversion (purple tones, white backgrounds)
- DexSwapStatusCard.tsx: add isError state for bridge_jupiter_failed (red border + failure message); full light theme conversion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove email-reply-parser to preserve forwarded email content (#3754)

* fix: remove email-reply-parser to preserve forwarded email content

The email-reply-parser library's Chinese quote header regex
/^(在[\s\S]+写道：)$/m catastrophically over-matches, consuming user
text and forwarded content when any paragraph starts with "在" and the
email chain contains "写道：". This caused forwarded email content to
silently disappear from agent prompts.

Remove email-reply-parser entirely and trust the LLM to handle email
structure. The full email body (including forwarded content, blockquoted
replies, and nested threads) is now preserved in the agent prompt.

- Remove stripQuotedReply() from extractEmailBody()
- Delete quote-strip.ts
- Remove email-reply-parser dependency
- Add integration tests for extractEmailBody()

Closes #3752

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(state-maps): add state-wise GSDP indicators from RBI Handbook

Adds three new choropleth indicators sourced from the RBI Handbook of
Statistics on Indian States (Tables 21 & 22):

- GSDP Growth Rate: real YoY % at constant 2011-12 prices (RdBu colormap)
- GSDP (Real): ₹ Crore at constant 2011-12 prices (Blues colormap)
- GSDP (Nominal): ₹ Crore at current prices (Oranges colormap)

Data covers 33 states/UTs across 14 fiscal years (2011-12 to 2024-25),
converted from ₹ Lakh to ₹ Crore. Three UTs with no separate RBI figures
(Ladakh, Lakshadweep, Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu) are stored
as null values and shown as no-data on the map.

Changes:
- types.ts: GSDPStateSeries + GSDPStateData interfaces
- useMospiState.ts: useGSDPStateData() hook + gsdpStateSlice() helper
- state-maps.tsx: GSDP hook, loading/error handling, period/data
  resolution branch, dynamic unit prop, updated description/sources
- public/data/mospi/gsdp-state.json: 36-state × 14-year dataset

feat: initial commit with automatic versioning

Payroll Comparison Tool v1.3.0 - stable checkpoint before major changes

Features:
- Excel/CSV payroll file comparison with tolerance-based matching
- Multi-sheet support with sheet selector
- 5 output sheets: Detailed, Aggregated, Not in Input, 50030 rule, 24094 validation
- Pre-comparison validation (duplicates, outliers, non-numeric detection)
- Charts: exception breakdown, top 10 employees, difference histogram, mismatch trends
- Pattern detection and insight generation
- Multiple export formats: Excel, CSV, PDF, JSON
- Dark mode toggle
- Comparison history (last 20 runs)
- Settings persistence (localStorage + JSON export/import)
- Single-file build for easy distribution

Tech stack:
- React + TypeScript + Vite
- ExcelJS for Excel I/O
- Chart.js for visualizations
- jsPDF for PDF reports
- vite-plugin-singlefile for single HTML output

Versioning:
- Automatic import from package.json
- npm scripts: version:patch, version:minor, version:major
- preversion hook: auto-build and stage dist/index.html

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix FFmpeg performance: pre-scale images to 1920x1080 before encoding

Pexels images can be 6000x4000px causing 0.019x encoding speed.
Now images are pre-resized with FFmpeg before segment rendering,
and createSegment no longer scales on every frame. Also switched
to ultrafast preset to improve encoding speed on cloud server.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Trust self-signed cert in login keychain during install

The postinstall script now waits for the service to generate its
self-signed certificate, then adds it as a trusted root in the
user's login keychain. This prevents cert warnings in Chrome and
Safari when Keystone makes requests to the local proxy.

commit.message:
Optimize AISHub: single global call instead of per-zone rotation

One API call per minute without bounding box params fetches ~50k global
positions. Server-side filtering via find_zone() + is_tanker() keeps only
tankers inside our 6 geofence zones. Eliminates wasted calls on empty
zones (Suez, Panama) and gives full coverage in every cycle.

commit.message:
Force model completeness: never silently drop frictions from original paper

The pipeline was producing critiques that silently dropped key frictions
(e.g., moral hazard in Rajan 1992), making the critique vacuous because
it attacked a simpler problem than the original paper solves.

System prompt changes:
- Add Model Completeness Check to self-audit protocol: inventory all
  frictions, agents, incentive constraints, and trade-offs before writing
- Explicitly forbid silently dropping frictions

Critique prompt changes:
- Add Step 0 (mental model inventory) before writing begins
- Responsibility 1 is now "model completeness" — preserve every friction
- Responsibility 4 is now "robustness to original frictions" — verify
  proposed mechanisms survive all frictions in the full model
- Model section must include ALL features from original paper; only the
  contract space may differ between original and proposed alternative
- Analysis section must verify incentive compatibility against all
  original frictions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: patents tab plural, add abstracts for both working papers

fix: update ultralytics version for PyTorch 2.10 compatibility

PyTorch 2.10 changed torch.load() to use weights_only=True by default,
which breaks ultralytics 8.1.0 when loading YOLO models. Updating to
>=8.3.0 which handles this correctly.

commit.message:
fix: keep briefing drawer fresh with client-side polling and better error logging

Briefing was showing stale (7h old) because the refresh cron's DB upsert
was failing silently (missing sections column). Added client-side polling
every 5 minutes so the drawer stays current without page reload, and
improved error serialization so Supabase errors are actually readable.

ci: deploy GitHub Pages only on tag push (v*)

Previously triggered on every main push. Now matches the project's
"deploy = git tag" convention. Manual deploy still available via
workflow_dispatch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add personal info ingestion pipeline and Playwright e2e tests

- scripts/sync-context.ts: CLI that reads a raw .txt/.md file, calls
  claude-haiku-4-5 to extract personal_info/work_history/hobbies/contact,
  and deep-merges the result into memory/context.json without overwriting
  existing keys
- memory/raw/information.txt: source file with Kaleb's bio, work history,
  education, hobbies, and contact details
- memory/context.json: populated with 5 work history entries, location,
  education, hobbies, and contact info via bun run sync-context
- lib/memory.ts: extended ContextJSON interface with 4 optional new fields;
  buildSystemPrompt() now renders Personal/Work History/Interests/Contact
  sections when data is present
- playwright.config.ts + tests/context-pipeline.spec.ts: 10 e2e tests —
  5 schema assertions on context.json and 5 API response assertions
  confirming the LLM surfaces the new personal context correctly
- package.json: added sync-context, test, and test:headed scripts

docs: add README + add_chat.py for easy chat management

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: skip early CheckAssetsAsync for solution inputs in ApplicationRunner (#321)

Solution files (.sln/.slnx) don't have a single project.assets.json,
so the early CheckAssetsAsync call incorrectly triggers TW2003. The
per-project check in ProjectGraphService.BuildPlanAsync already handles
per-project assets validation correctly.

For solution inputs:
- Skip CheckAssetsAsync entirely (no false TW2003)
- Still invoke RestoreAsync when --restore is passed
- .csproj behavior remains unchanged

Closes #316

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix GA4 URL matching — handle scheme in domain, www/non-www variants

Root cause: domain stored as 'https://example.com' caused double-scheme
('https://https://example.com/path'). Also www mismatch between crawled
URLs and GA4 paths. Now strips scheme from domain and tries both
www and non-www variants in both lookup and matching.
